revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-305

For a transmitting antenna system, the region which is sufficiently remote from the antenna system for the wavelets arriving from the various parts of the system to be considered to follow parallel paths.

Reference: B.S. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
